testcase.name: test_quote_acceptance_generates_invoice_and_order

failure.message: AssertionError: Quote acceptance failed: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_330.py:180: in test_quote_acceptance_generates_invoice_and_order assert accept_resp.status_code == 200, f"Quote acceptance failed: {accept_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Quote acceptance failed: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
